description: Legal document. In the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe. Dated: Adar I 1437 Seleucid, which is 1126 CE. Abū l-Munā al-ʿAṭṭār Yaʿaqov b. David ha-Parnas declares that he has received from Abū l-Munā Shelomo b. Ḥayyim the Seventh a sum of 57 dinars as an investment that he is free to use as he pleases in the drug/perfume trade for a period of one year. (Information from CUDL and Goitein's index card.) See also JRL Gaster heb. ms 1760/5 (PGPID 32315).
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
